creator: fuz@FreeBSD.org
text:
Thank you for your submission.

I see that your port downloads a precompiled binary from the internet.  We don't like that unless there's no other way.  Please rework the port to build the binary in the port itself.  This port appears to be written in Go, so see § 6.5.8 of the Porter's Handbook for how to write the port Makefile to write the application.

Then there should be no need for ONLY_FOR_ARCHS either.

Please also expand pkg-descr to at least three lines.

It would also be nice if you could add a DOCS option and install the documentation included in the project if it is set.

Rest looks good!
